untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (ascending broadening formation with diverging trend lines) requires geometric/structural analysis not available in indicator-based backtester. The signal relies on identifying two diverging trendlines and measuring formation height, which cannot be expressed using only price/volume indicators and comparison operators. Recommend: implement custom pattern detector or use price action zones (support/resistance levels) manually defined for each occurrence.
translation_notes: This is a chart pattern recognition signal that fundamentally requires trendline identification and formation geometry analysis. The allowed indicators are point-in-time measurements (moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.) and cannot detect the structure of a broadening pattern. A practical workaround would require: (1) manual trendline identification, (2) storing upper/lower trendline values as external parameters, or (3) implementing a dedicated pattern recognition module outside the indicator framework.
